data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a recording option being enabled, but the evidence does not explicitly confirm that this feature is implemented or functioning as required. While the linked use case mentions that sessions are automatically recorded to the cloud with consent, it does not clarify whether the recording option is enabled by default or if it can be toggled on or off. This lack of clarity indicates a gap in the requirement coverage for the recording option.
gaps: Recording option (if enabled) is not explicitly validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
